nasb.text: They found Adoni-bezek in Bezek and fought against him, and they defeated the Canaanites and the Perizzites.

esv.text: They found Adoni-bezek at Bezek and fought against him and defeated the Canaanites and the Perizzites.

cnv.text: 他們在那裡遇見了比色王，就與他交戰，擊殺了迦南人和比利洗人。

ccb.text: 他们又在那里遇见亚多尼·比色，与他交战，打败了他带领的迦南人和比利洗人。
